lessonTitle: Pronunciation of ض (Letter Recognition → Makharij Practice)
learningObjective: Student will produce ض with correct articulation point and consistent sound characteristics.

explanation.simple: Learn where ض is articulated and practice short drills with a focus on correct mouth/tongue position.

scholarGrounded.content: SOURCE REQUIRED. Ingestion must provide the scholar-grounded explanation for ض articulation and relevant characteristics (with reference spans). No rule invention is allowed.

scholarReference.notes: Populate with the approved makharij/sifaat explanation for ض.

practiceExercise.prompt: Record your voice reading ض (isolated), then with a simple harakat pattern (as specified by ingested curriculum) 5 times with consistent articulation.
steps: Slowly say ض while focusing on correct articulation point.
Repeat isolated ض, then repeat 5 short repetitions in a consistent rhythm.
If you have a reference audio, record again and compare only the articulation point and sound consistency (not speed).

rubricJson.provenanceRequirement: Rubric text may be admin-authored, but any correction rationale must reference scholar-grounded content before evaluation guidance is generated.

assessmentMethod.evaluationNotes: Phase 1 will map signals to student_attempts scoring and provide correction using stored references only.

governance.notes: This sample uses placeholders and requires ingestion before AI can produce scholar-grounded explanations for ض.
